locs.text: dekhen ki kya aap samay par ganiteey sameekaran hal kar sakate hain
pooree tarah se hal!
galat tareeke se hal kiya.
agala lekhan karane se pahale kitane mileesekand tak prateeksha karanee hogee?
dekhen ki kya aap samay par koee kunjee daba sakate hain
charitr samay par dabaaya nahin gaya.
aapane sahee charitr ko dabaaya hai!
aapane galat charitr dabaaya hai.
baahar nikalane ke lie aisch dabaen.
nyoonatam laal rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 hai.
nyoonatam hara rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 hai.
nyoonatam neela rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 hai.
nyoonatam rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 rangon ke lie 255 ya 16 rangon ke lie 16 hai.
adhikatam laal rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 hai.
adhikatam hara rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 hai.
adhikatam neela rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 hai.
inaput prompt mein jo likha hai use dikhaana hai ya nahin.
chunane ke lie nyoonatam sankhya kya hai?
chunane ke lie adhikatam sankhya kya hai?
asalee rang samarthan ko sakriy karata hai.
kitane mileesekand samayabaahy se pahale keepres ke lie prateeksha karane ke lie? (kastam kathinaee mein)
agale charan ko aarekhit karane se pahale kitane mileesekand prateeksha karen?
aasaan kathinaee mein khel shuroo karata hai
madhyam kathinaee mein khel shuroo karata hai
kathin kathinaee mein khel shuroo karata hai
bahut kathin kathinaee mein khel shuroo karata hai
kastam kathinaee mein khel shuroo karata hai. krpaya dhyaan den ki mileesekand mein kastam taimaut tark ke roop mein likha jaana chaahie.
apane pasandeeda pragati tekst sthaan ka chayan karen.
aap keval sankhyaen likh sakate hain.
baahar nikalane ke lie "kyoo" dabaen.
saamp ka khel!
aap ek antariksh yaan hain aur ulkaen aapako nasht karane ke lie aa rahee hain. kya aap ise bacha sakate hain?
khel khatm
apratyaashit truti

spesaship ko rendar karane ke lie povaralain ka istemaal karana hai ya kairektar se bade staindard ka istemaal karana hai. yadi aap ulka ke saath powairlinai ka upayog karana chaahate hain, to aapako powairlinai samarthan ke saath ek upayukt font sthaapit karane kee aavashyakata hai.
mileesekand mein khel kee gati nirdisht karata hai.
kya aap galat ghode ka samarthan karate hain?
haingamain gem shuroo karata hai
ek galat akshar aur aapako phaansee par lataka diya jaega!
ek yaadrchchhik akshar phenkakar apane haingamain kaushal ka pareekshan karen.
aap ek antariksh yaan hain aur ulkaapind aapako nasht karane aa rahe hain. kya aap unhen chakama de sakate hain?
ek yaadrchchhik uddharan praapt karen
roosee roole
do antariksh yaan ek doosare ke saath ladaee par hain. ek shot aur antariksh yaan ud jaega. yah ek sthaaneey do-khilaadee khel hai.
vardal gem simyuletar
mool roop se vardal gem khelen
ghoda
[aintair] daud shuroo karen | [aisch] baahar nikalen | [up/down] chayan ko aage badhaen
aapaka ghoda daud jeet gaya!
aapaka ghoda daud haar gaya!
aap phans gae!
aap jeet gae!
aapakee shart kya hai?
aapane sahee anumaan lagaaya!
aap galat ho gae.
lekin, aap badakismat hain. haare hue.
aap bhaagyashaalee hain! vijeta!
yah ek dra hai.
khilaadee {0} jeetata hai!
vartamaan charitr:
aapane sahee shabd ka anumaan lagaaya! aap jeet gae!
ek saanp ka khel.
aapako achchhe prasiddh uddharan dikhaata hai.
apanee pasandeeda kathinaee chunen, jahaan 0 aasaan hai, 1 madhyam hai, 2 kathin hai, 3 bahut kathin hai, aur 4 kastam hai.

spesaship ko rendar karane ke lie paavaralain ka upayog karen ya maanak gretar dain kairektar ka upayog karen. yadi aap shipadyooet ke saath paavaralain ka upayog karana chaahate hain, to aapako paavaralain samarthan ke saath ek upayukt font sthaapit karana hoga.
saamaany shabd soochee ka upayog karata hai.
poorn shabd soochee ka upayog karata hai.
ping-pong gem!
skor
setings pravishtiyaan praapt karane mein viphal.
ghudadaud
jallaad
ulka chakama
ulka shootar
pong
jahaaj yugal
snekar
vardal
vardal (mool)
agyaat uddharan.
agyaat lekhak.
yah aapako rangon ko konfigar karane kee anumati deta hai
yah anubhaag aapako solvar ko konfigar karane deta hai.
yah anubhaag aapako speedapres ko konfigar karane deta hai.
yah anubhaag aapako metiyor aur shipadyooet ko konfigar karane deta hai.
adhikatam rang star. nyoonatam sveekrt maan 0 hai aur adhikatam sveekrt maan 255 rangon ke lie 255 ya 16 rangon ke lie 16 hai.
